goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: T021 closes the final intake race. Late old completions are stale and valueless and return before UI mutation; matching success alone rotates the key. Controlled promises prove concurrency, rotation, and late suppression. All prior Pantry milestone boundaries remain intact. Build and rendered acceptance remain unverified.

worker_package.objective: Run complete isolated final Pantry verification with one focused rendered workflow test, full gates, production build, accessibility, screenshots, and disposable migrations without touching live .next or the normal database.
verify: Run full format, lint, type, tests, OpenAPI, and build in mirror
Run focused Playwright workflow on port 3100
stop_if: Isolation, port, or secret/data exclusion cannot be proven.
Product source or existing files must change.
Live provider, Docker, device, or backup mutation would occur.
Any final verification gate fails twice.

evidence: Late old-key results are stale and cannot update any current intake UI state.
Focused and full safe gates pass with 163 unit and 78 integration tests.
Prior provenance, obsolete cleanup, atomic transactions, uncertainty, FEFO, attribution, origins, migrations, recipe text, and dirty-work boundaries remain intact.

parallel_safety.rationale: Final verification uses one mirror, database, port, and evidence directory.
